claim_text: Katyayani Peeth is a current temple-ashram complex in Vrindavan represented by Katyayani Trust.
Katyayani Trust presents Swami Keshavanand as linked to Lahiri Mahasaya and as consecrator of the temple in 1923.
notes: Institutional lineage and own-history claim; not independent historical proof.

claim_text: The AOAY relation to the exact present Katyayani Peeth footprint is not double-verified.
notes: Controlled passage and separate exact-place identity were not both obtained.

claim_text: A Neem Karoli Baba ashram complex exists in Vrindavan and contains the samadhi associated with Maharaj-ji.
notes: Official current management material remains unavailable.

claim_text: The current official operational manager of Neem Karoli Baba Ashram Vrindavan was not reliably established.
notes: No current official management page reliably retrieved.

claim_text: Shri Krishna Janmasthan Seva Sansthan manages the Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi temple premises in Mathura.
notes: Current court and news reporting agree; similarly named advocacy trusts excluded.

claim_text: Shri Krishna Janmasthan is an active public worship and festival site.
notes: Exact July 2026 access rules remain unverified.

claim_text: Radha Kund is a distinct named sacred water body adjoining Shyam Kund.
Shyam Kund is a distinct named sacred water body adjoining Radha Kund.
Govardhan Hill is a physical sacred landscape distinct from the Govardhan Parikrama route.
Govardhan Parikrama is a physically traceable continuing circumambulation practice.
notes: Government-linked district material and current public evidence support continuing practice.

claim_text: Kusum Sarovar is a current named heritage and sacred-water object in the Govardhan landscape.
Kusum Sarovar is identified within the sacred Govardhan parikrama context.
notes: Circuit-level relation; not proof of object-level recurring practice.

claim_text: A recurring object-level living practice at Kusum Sarovar was not established.
notes: General sacred use and route inclusion are insufficient.

claim_text: Fysieke plek bevestigd; actuele bezoekbaarheid niet betrouwbaar vastgesteld.
notes: Applied individually because authoritative current access conditions were not established.

claim_text: A single object-level operational manager was not established for the distributed kund, hill, route and sarovar objects.
notes: Multiple public and religious actors may hold different responsibilities.
